name: Golden Triangle Tour with Mathura
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Jaipur, Mathura with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the h
itinerary.description: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Delhi sightseeing: Today, after breakfast, we took a guided tour to visit Jama M
itinerary.description: Delhi sightseeing: Today, after breakfast, we took a guided tour to visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, India Gate, President House, Parliament, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, . Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Agra (250 KM
itinerary.description: Delhi to Agra (250 KM. Approx. 3-4 Hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Agra and En-Route visit Krishna Janmabhoomi Temple Mathura & Iskcon Temple, Prem mandir . Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra to Jaipur (260 Kms
itinerary.description: Agra to Jaipur (260 Kms. approx. 6 Hrs.): Today early morning a guided tour to visit Taj Mahal on Sun Rise, and back to the hotel. After breakfast, proceed to visit Agra Fort and drive to Jaipur on the way to visit Fatehpur Sikri . Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Sightseeing; Today after breakfast, a guided to the ancient capital of Am
itinerary.description: Jaipur Sightseeing; Today after breakfast, a guided to the ancient capital of Amber, visiting beautiful Amber Fort, Water Palace, Hawa Mahal (Window Palace), City Place and Observatory (Jantar Mantar) and famous block printing & Rajasthani handicraft work being done for centuries in Jaipur. Overnight stay at the hotel

itinerary.title: Jaipur – Delhi (280 KM
itinerary.description:
Jaipur – Delhi (280 KM. Approx. 5-6 Hrs.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Delhi and drop you at the Airport/Railway station with sweet memories.
Please note: Taj Mahal Closed on every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours

Accommodation
